selection_policy.pattern_filter: pattern hits enter directly; only same-day return > 9.9% is excluded
selection_policy.limit_up_filter: exclude both pattern and phase4_top candidates with same-day return > 9.9% before watchlist selection
selection_policy.position_size_formula: D = 2 * ATR14; effective average stop distance before third add = 0.85D; total planned position = min(40%, 2% / (0.85 * 2 * ATR14 / close))
